risk_description: Generated output may contain inaccurate or fabricated information
example_scenario: AI drafts KPI commentary with unsupported explanation
detective_control: Spot-check generated outputs against source data
corrective_action: Correct output and document issue in AI incident log

risk_description: Confidential or personal data may be entered into GenAI tools
example_scenario: Staff paste customer complaint details into external chatbot
detective_control: Review tool access and usage logs
corrective_action: Remove data and escalate privacy incident

risk_description: AI output may not clearly identify source data
example_scenario: Dashboard narrative generator summarizes results without source reference

risk_description: Users may treat AI-generated output as final decision
example_scenario: Staff accept triage suggestion without review
detective_control: Monthly review of accepted AI suggestions

risk_description: Third-party tool may reuse submitted data for training or secondary purposes
example_scenario: Vendor GenAI tool processes internal documents
preventive_control: Vendor data-use review and contractual restriction
